Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/analytics/metrics/peak-hours" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
from collections import defaultdict
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
rows=d.get\('data',[]\)
by_hour=defaultdict\(int\)
by_day=defaultdict\(int\)
days={0:'Mon',1:'Tue',2:'Wed',3:'Thu',4:'Fri',5:'Sat',6:'Sun'}
for r in rows:
    by_hour[r['hour_of_day']]+=r['request_count']
    by_day[r['day_of_week']]+=r['request_count']
total=sum\(by_hour.values\(\)\)
print\('TOP HOURS:'\)
for h,c in sorted\(by_hour.items\(\),key=lambda x:-x[1]\)[:5]:
    print\(f'  {h:02d}:00  {c} req  \({c/total:.1%}\)'\)
print\('BY DAY:'\)
for day,c in sorted\(by_day.items\(\),key=lambda x:-x[1]\):
    print\(f'  {days[day]}  {c} req  \({c/total:.1%}\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/analytics/tools/usage-stats" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
total_exec=sum\(r['total_executions'] for r in d\)
print\(f'Total executions: {total_exec:,}'\)
for r in d:
    print\(f\\"{r['tool_name']:20} {r['total_executions']:6,} execs  {r['success_rate']:.1%} success  avg {r['avg_duration_ms']:.0f}ms  p95 {r['p95_duration_ms']:.0f}ms\\"\)
" 2>&1)
